_comment: Era-correct wordmark per year. `file` = a path in the working tree; `git` = `<rev>:<path>` pulled from history and cached in .logo-cache/. The wide horizontal wordmarks (viewBox 0 0 1420 200: images/logo.svg, images/logo-2018.svg) sit best in the top-left slot; the earlier gem/emblem mark is squarer. These are best guesses from git history (`git log --follow -- images/logo.svg` / `images/logo.png`) — eyeball each year and adjust. `git show 0d0e5b6:images/logo.svg` is the 2017–2023 emblem; `5f51296:images/logo.png` / `1fc31fa:images/logo.png` are the 2014 / 2015 raster marks.
